• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with shake animation and 3D WebGL particle background
  • Offers 5 selectable response tones including friendly, roast, and dramatic
  • Auto-reverts to default 8 display 45 seconds after showing answers
    onclick="askQuestion()"
    setTimeout(revertToEight, 45000)

This web application replicates a Magic 8 Ball with AI-generated dynamic responses. Users input questions, select answer tones, and receive results in an animated 3D interface. The app automatically returns to its default state 45 seconds after displaying an answer.
